All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
ChannelManager
 
ChannelStep
 
ChatChannel
Represents a chat channel with specific settings such as range, access permissions, and active members.
ChatContext
Mutable state for a single chat message as it moves through YoChat's pipeline.
ChatListener
 
ChatManager
 
ChatPipelineManager
Runtime registry and executor for YoChat's chat pipeline.
ChatPipelineManager.RegisteredPipelineStep
Immutable metadata for a single registered pipeline step.
ChatPipelineStep
Represents a single processing step inside YoChat's chat pipeline.
ConfigManager
 
Discord
Webhook system by SMCode (Link to the video)
FilterStep
 
FinalizeStep
 
FormatStep
 
MentionStep
 
MessageParseManager
 
MutedPlayer
Represents a mute entry managed by YoChat.
MuteManager
 
MuteStep
 
PlaceholderStep
 
PlayerJoinListener
 
PlayerQuitListener
 
PrefixManager
 
Stage
Defines the ordered stages of YoChat's message processing pipeline.
SuffixManager
 
ViewerStep
 
WebhookPayload
Webhook system by SMCode (Link to the video)
WebhookPayload.Author
 
WebhookPayload.Embed
 
WebhookPayload.Field
 
YoChat
Main plugin entry point and runtime service provider for YoChat.
YoChatAPI
 
YoChatChannelJoinEvent
Fired before a player is added to a YoChat channel.
YoChatChannelLeaveEvent
Fired before a player is removed from a YoChat channel.
YoChatCommand
 
YoChatMessageEvent
Fired after the pipeline has produced the message component but before final send handling.
YoChatPipelineEvent
Fired immediately after YoChat's internal pipeline has executed.
YoChatProvider
Internal provider contract used to expose YoChat runtime services through the public API.
YoChatSendEvent
Fired right before YoChat hands the message off for final delivery.
